reviews.review_description: This app is super cool for beginners to explore various energy sector related setups. Good for school and college kids 🙂

five stars cuz it really is pretty cool and free! and looks awesome using QGO.    only slight gripe is the little robot guy when he talks is sometimes behind you making it harder to hear him but otherwise such a great little app thats FREE and really can show what learning in VR can really be!
if my father was actually talking to me it'd be something id love to show him lol

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your positive review, we appreciate it! :) Yeah, the robot guy, by the way, we call him Robbie, sometimes has a head of his own.. :))

Team of Developers

reviews.review_description:
I spent a fantastic hour in this museum
 learning about nuclear power and wind energy. I'll be back as soon as I can to learn more about solar energy as well. 

The designers of this experience are brilliant... I learned so much and have even more appreciation for engineers who come up with these amazing technologies....well done!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your review, which makes us very happy! :) We are pleased to implement these educational applications for you.

Team of Developers
